arts.ttl: Preview: Leeds United vs. Blackburn Rovers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Leeds United and Blackburn Rovers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Shop window? These PL clubs may be sending hint to Leeds United over January deals
arts.sum: Welshman David Brooks has been short of playing time since Andoni Iraola took over at Bournemouth, leading to a loan move last January to Southampton, who pipped Leeds’ interest at the time to sign the right-sided attacker. The January transfer window is around the corner and for Leeds United, they may be top of the league, but will surely be considering a loan from a Premier League club to bolster in key positions.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers 2024 reflections and John Eustace's challenge to players
arts.sum: The Blackburn Rovers head coach reflected on his side's progress and what he wants to see from his side moving forward

arts.ttl: Gabriel Agbonlahor takes shot at Leeds United as promotion verdict made
arts.sum: Ex-England striker Gabriel Agbonlahor has claimed that Aston Villa are in for six points against Leeds United, should they get promoted back to the Premier League. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United “forced” to make changes v Blackburn with fitness headache
arts.sum: The strength of Leeds’ squad depth this week is going to be put to the test with a quick turnaround from the 29th to the 1st, but the quality of subs that Daniel Farke had at his disposal against Derby underlined his respective firepower. Leeds United’s attention turns to New Year’s Day now where they will be hoping that they can extend their lead at the top of the table against Blackburn Rovers.
